"D:\Visual Studio\Visual Studio 2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MachineManager.dir/objects.a
E:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MachineManager.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\MachineManager.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MachineManager.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MachineManager.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMachineManager.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\MachineManager.dir\linkLibs.rsp
